Off Calendar May-29-2002 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Aug-06-02 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar May-07-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Reuben B. Jacobson, Esq. LEWIS D'AMATO, BRISBOIS & BISGAARD, (415) 438-6612, appeared on behalf of defendants and moving parties William Gwire and Gwire and Frassetto. Fred G. Meis, Esq. MEIS & ALEXANDER, (415) 091-4612 appeared on behalf of plaintiffs Gloria Scherpf and William Scherpf

After argument, the tentative ruling was adopted as the order of the court: Defendant Gwire and Frassetto's motion for summary judgment denied. Triable issue of fact exists re whether relief from dismissal pursuant to 473 (b) would have been granted. Prevailing party to prepare order pursuant to 437 c(g) (JJM/MD) Reporter: Joyce Long, CSR # 3620
